main.description: Public-facing age-verification status record. The Keyhole.xxx AppView reads this record to decide whether to blur or display age-restricted content for a given viewer. This record contains no PII — it is a derived, boolean summary of the user's net.traiforce.verify.age attestation.

isVerified.description: True when a valid net.traiforce.verify.age record exists for this account and has not yet expired. False otherwise.

verifiedTier.description: The age tier confirmed by the linked age attestation. Omitted when isVerified is false.
